//: Drop this file into any repo under ~/repo/<profile>/<repo>/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json to get a 'Reopen in Container' workflow for that repo. Requires PROFILE to be exported in the shell before launching VS Code (e.g. `export PROFILE=nranthony && code .`). VS Code will delegate to windows-ai-sandbox's compose file, so CLI and IDE share the same per-profile container.
name: windows-ai-sandbox (${localEnv:PROFILE})
